posts.text: How to place orders in MCX Pre open — It’s not like preopen of equity segment. Session is only for cancelling the orders if required for non-retail clients. This session is not applicable for retail clients image 1104×631 104 KB

posts.author: Aditya_Gupta
posts.text: How to place orders in MCX Pre open — In MCX, there is preopen from 8.45 to 9am, but when i place orders during that time, message appears that your order will be sent at market opening. But, some orders are already placed during that time. So, how can i place my orders during that time
